heading: Making certain policies and execution plans relating to personnel clearances available to industry partners
label: 3351a Making certain policies and execution plans relating to personnel clearances available to industry partners
notes: References in TextExecutive Order 12829, referred to in subsecs. (a)(2) and (b), is Ex. Ord. No. 12829, , 58 F.R. 3479, which is set out as a note under .Jan. 6, 1993section 3161 of this title

children.heading: Security executive agent
children.label: 1 Security executive agent
children.text: The term “Security Executive Agent” means the officer serving as the Security Executive Agent pursuant to .section 3162a of this title

children.heading: Appropriate industry partner
children.label: 2 Appropriate industry partner
children.text: The term “appropriate industry partner” means a contractor, licensee, or grantee (as defined in section 101(a) of Executive Order 12829 ( note; relating to National Industrial Security Program), as in effect on the day before ) that is participating in the National Industrial Security Program established by such Executive Order.50 U.S.C. 3161December 20, 2019

children.heading: Sharing of policies and plans required
children.label: b Sharing of policies and plans required
children.text: Each head of a Federal agency shall share policies and plans relating to security clearances with appropriate industry partners directly affected by such policies and plans in a manner consistent with the protection of national security as well as the goals and objectives of the National Industrial Security Program administered pursuant to Executive Order 12829 ( note; relating to the National Industrial Security Program).50 U.S.C. 3161

children.heading: Development of policies and procedures required
children.label: c Development of policies and procedures required
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , the Security Executive Agent and the Director of the National Industrial Security Program shall jointly develop policies and procedures by which appropriate industry partners with proper security clearances and a need to know can have appropriate access to the policies and plans shared pursuant to subsection (b) that directly affect those industry partners.December 20, 2019
